title: [YTP] Bitches, Magic Balls, and the Taste of Dinner
description:
My first Youtube poop, enjoy. Please forgive the bad quality and shortness, I'm still trying to figure WMM out. I put (some) effort into it too...

I do not own the clips used. I do not own the Song (Navras - Juno Reactor). Comedic purposes only, people. 

Here's a quick summary of the plot:

The Hyrule Bitch Trials have been underway for years. Now the Duke of all Bitches grovels before King Harkinian, begging for mercy. The King declines. The Bitch Duke calls the situation "Madness!". The King offers no sympathy, for the Bitch Duke has threatened the people of Hyrule with BALLS and PENIS. The Duke is speechless. The King quickly exclaims that This is Hyrule, and FIRES HIS LAZER, ending the threat of Bitches forever. But all is still not well... The King's trusted Gwonam swoops in and tells the King that BIRDS, BOMBS, and the King's Face are inert. Distraught by this terrible news, the King asks how they can help. Gwonam tells the King that he must eat his balls. Desperate for a solution to Hyrule's problem, the King agrees, and proclaims himself Old Gregg... for some damn reason. He then begins feasting on Gwonam's mystical testicles. Suddenly, the King has a terrible and explosive allergic reaction to the magical balls! Only Gwonam remains, and... well, he's become EVIL

Video Sources:
Link: The Faces of Evil
Zelda: The Wand of Gamelon
Chad Warden
300
The Lazer Collection
DragonBall Z
Super Mario World
The Legend of Old Gregg
WTF Bomb

I'm glad it has a decent rating even though Youtube messed it up. Thanks people :)
